function.name: m2ap_decode_pdu
function.signature: int m2ap_decode_pdu(M2AP_M2AP_PDU_t *pdu, const uint8_t *const buffer, uint32_t length)

bug.description: scheduling priority inversion where lower-priority traffic is served before higher-priority

prompt:
There is a scheduling priority inversion where lower-priority traffic is served before higher-priority downstream of function m2ap_decode_pdu in the openair2/M2AP subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/M2AP/m2ap_decoder.c:155.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
